hero.subtitle: A technology lab designing digital products aligned with human mind and behavioral models.

radar.title: We Don't Guess.
radar.description: We audit and optimize your product across 5 core cognitive pillars.
radar.quote: A beautiful UI means nothing if the brain rejects it.

metrics.label: Retention
metrics.desc: Long-term user loyalty driven by habit-forming design.

metrics.label: Cognitive Load
metrics.desc: Zero ambiguity. The brain understands the interface instantly.

metrics.label: Trigger
metrics.desc: Psychological safety and action triggers built through consistency.

philosophy.title: Perception Architecture Layers
philosophy.subtitle: Explore the layers to see how the system works.

topics.title: Cognitive Foundation
topics.subtitle: Structural Foundation
topics.description: {{d}}Visual aesthetics (UI){{/d}} is merely the storefront of a digital product; no design can save {{h}}a structure the mind rejects{{/h}}. If the system's load-bearing columns are not built according to human perception and {{h}}'Cognitive Load' limits{{/h}}, that product is doomed to collapse at the user's first complex decision.
topics.technical: We calculate the 'Cognitive Static Load' of every screen. Using Hick's Law and Working Memory limits, we place information columns where the brain expects them, ensuring zero structural collapse during user navigation.

topics.title: Noise Cancellation
topics.subtitle: Signal Processing
topics.description: The digital ecosystem is saturated with stimuli that fragment user attention. Information overload and aggressive visual competition create {{w}}'Inattentional Blindness'{{/w}} in the brain. Users filter out and ignore the core message within interfaces that exceed their cognitive limits.
topics.technical: We center our approach on {{w}}Signal Detection Theory{{/w}} to maximize the signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) in your interface. We isolate cognitive noise and transform your brand's core value proposition into the purest frequency and visual {{w}}Saliency{{/w}} that the brain can process fastest.

topics.title: Biological Locksmith
topics.subtitle: Evolutionary Fit
topics.description: The human brain has been programmed to conserve energy throughout hundreds of thousands of years of evolution. Every non-intuitive interface that forces the user to think creates an {{w}}'evolutionary mismatch'{{/w}} in the mind. The brain quickly abandons any system where it has to expend unnecessary effort.
topics.technical: We integrate Evolutionary Psychology principles into digital products. By designing decision architecture according to the {{w}}'Path of Least Resistance'{{/w}}, we eliminate micro-frictions that elevate the user's cortisol (stress) levels — locking technology into biological alignment with human nature.

topics.title: Behavioral Catalyst
topics.subtitle: Strategic Transition
topics.description: The biggest chasm in business is between abstract ideas and technical execution. Most digital projects break free of scientific grounding during the strategy-to-software transition and devolve into unmeasurable, vision-devoid heaps.
topics.technical: We close this gap by merging behavioral science with code. We translate the subjective 'make it eye-catching' demand into millisecond-precision {{w}}Heatmap{{/w}} data, and the 'make it user-friendly' expectation into {{w}}Time-on-Task{{/w}} metrics — transforming ideas into measurable engineering output.

services.heading: Transforming Tech Into
services.subtitle: From ideation to automation infrastructure, we propel your business into the future with scientific methods.

items.title: Perception Architecture
items.subtitle: Perception Architecture
items.description: We transform early-stage ideas into profitable brands through scientific validation (PhD-depth) and neuro-design principles.

items.title: Cognitive Audit
items.subtitle: Cognitive Audit
items.description: We perform cognitive and technical X-rays of your existing digital products (web/mobile), diagnosing bottlenecks that cause user churn and delivering enlightenment.

items.title: Intelligent Engineering
items.subtitle: Intelligent Automation
items.description: We build systems using n8n workflows and custom Python scripts that reduce your operational costs, technologically propelling your business into the future.

modals.title: Scientific Validation
modals.subtitle: RESEARCH & DATA SCIENCE
modals.description: Every decision is backed by {{h}}PhD-level research{{/h}} and data science. We eliminate guesswork and validate your product strategy within a {{h}}Statistical Confidence Interval{{/h}}. Through A/B testing, cohort analysis, and experimental design, we ensure scientific justification behind every pixel.

processSteps.description: We transform your idea into a structured scientific hypothesis. We create a multi-dimensional hypothesis matrix based on market size, target audience dynamics, and competitive intensity parameters.
We analyze your target audience's decision-making mechanisms within a neurocognitive framework. We extract in-depth profiles based on cognitive biases, attention thresholds, and motivation triggers.
We design A/B test scenarios that simulate real user behavior. We statistically model conversion, click, and engagement metrics for each variant.

processSteps.step: Statistical confidence interval calculation and approval
processSteps.description: We evaluate collected data using ANOVA and regression analyses. We continue iterations until reaching statistically significant results at a 95% confidence interval.

modals.title: Neuro-Design
modals.subtitle: NEURO-DESIGN ENGINEERING
modals.description: We engineer interfaces according to the brain's natural processing patterns. We measure {{h}}Cognitive Load{{/h}} thresholds using eye-tracking data and {{h}}Heatmap{{/h}} analysis, guiding the user's visual journey with microsecond precision through {{h}}Saliency{{/h}} mapping.

processSteps.step: Visual hierarchy and foveal perception detection
processSteps.description: We map foveal (central vision) and peripheral vision areas. We detect what the user sees at first glance and how the visual hierarchy is processed by the brain.

processSteps.step: Saccadic eye movement and focus simulation
processSteps.description: We simulate saccadic (rapid eye jump) movements to analyze the user's natural scanning path on screen. We visualize fixation points, fixation durations, and transition patterns.
We measure the cognitive load each interface element places on the brain. We identify friction points within Miller's Law (7±2) and Hick's Law frameworks, scoring mental overload risks.

We restructure the interface according to Gestalt perception principles like proximity, similarity, continuity, and closure. We create a visual architecture aligned with the brain's natural grouping mechanisms.

modals.title: Profitability Analysis
modals.subtitle: ROI & CONVERSION SCIENCE
modals.description: We position design as a profit engine, not a cost center. The {{h}}Return on Investment (ROI){{/h}} of every optimization is calculated. We track {{h}}Conversion Rate{{/h}} metrics at every funnel layer, tying design decisions directly to revenue growth.

processSteps.description: We examine every funnel stage in detail from awareness to purchase. We statistically determine at which step and why users abandon the process.
We calculate the financial impact of each friction point. We quantify how many customer losses and how much revenue loss a misplaced button or extra form field costs.
We measure and minimize the time users spend completing target tasks. We model the impact of each second on conversion rates to determine optimal flow duration.
We create 3, 6, and 12-month ROI projections for all optimizations. We model the investment-return curve and present the expected profit increase of each improvement with concrete figures.

modals.title: Brand Strategy
modals.subtitle: BRAND ARCHITECTURE
modals.description: We elevate your brand beyond random colors and logos. Using {{h}}Perceptual Consistency{{/h}} principles, we build a {{h}}Brand Architecture{{/h}} that leaves the same cognitive signature at every touchpoint. We create a measurable brand ecosystem connected at the neural network level.

processSteps.step: Perceptual blindness and competitive noise analysis
processSteps.description: We map the visual and message noise in your industry. We analyze the color, typography, and messaging patterns used by competitors to identify repetitions that create perceptual blindness.
We determine which category your brand will be associated with by the brain through Jungian archetypes and neurological decision-making models. We create a subconscious association map.

We build an association network that ensures your brand leaves lasting traces in memory using neural coding principles. We integrate visual, auditory, and emotional triggers into a unified network structure.

processSteps.step: Mental visibility and differentiation strategy delivery
processSteps.description: We deliver a comprehensive positioning strategy that differentiates your brand from competitive noise. We provide an implementation guide covering color, typography, tone of voice, and visual language components.

modals.title: UX X-Ray
modals.subtitle: INTERFACE DIAGNOSTICS
modals.description: We scan every screen of your digital product using {{h}}Cognitive Accessibility{{/h}} and {{h}}Eye-Tracking Simulation{{/h}}. We detect exactly where users get stuck subconsciously, which elements they ignore, and attention distribution with microsecond precision.

processSteps.step: Behavioral data collection from existing product
processSteps.description: We analyze your existing digital product with real user behaviors. We create a comprehensive behavioral data set from click maps, scroll depths, and session recordings.
We generate heatmaps for each screen using AI-powered eye-tracking simulation. We visualize where users look, what they skip, and how attention density is distributed.
We measure the cognitive cost of each interface element. We score and prioritize friction points caused by complex forms, unclear navigation, and excessive information load.
We provide prioritized solution recommendations for identified issues. Each recommendation comes with an impact score and post-implementation metric comparison.

modals.title: Bottleneck Diagnosis
modals.subtitle: BOTTLENECK ANALYSIS
modals.description: We map {{h}}Friction Points{{/h}} in the user flow. By analyzing {{h}}Drop-off Rates{{/h}} and wait times at each step, we scientifically diagnose invisible bottlenecks in your conversion funnel.

processSteps.step: Behavioral data collection from existing product
processSteps.description: We record user sessions and statistically analyze transition rates and abandonment points at each funnel stage.
We analyze visual behavior at bottleneck points. We identify which elements attract attention and which remain invisible.
We measure cognitive load and user friction at each bottleneck point. We discover the real causes of blockage by diving into root causes.
We provide specific solutions to eliminate bottlenecks. Each solution is presented with expected impact score and implementation priority.

modals.title: Cognitive Load Analysis
modals.subtitle: COGNITIVE LOAD METRICS
modals.description: We measure the {{h}}Cognitive Load{{/h}} value of every interface element on the brain. Within the framework of {{h}}Miller's Law{{/h}} and {{h}}Hick's Law{{/h}}, we produce mentally lightweight designs that don't exceed the user's decision-making capacity.

processSteps.step: Behavioral data collection from existing product
processSteps.description: We scan every screen of the interface for cognitive complexity. We measure parameters like element count, color variety, text density, and interaction complexity.
We analyze user gaze patterns in high cognitive load areas. We detect hesitations at decision points and unnecessary eye movements.
We calculate a composite cognitive load score for each screen. We report which elements exceed mental capacity within Miller's and Hick's Law frameworks.
We provide specific design recommendations to reduce cognitive load. We simplify the interface using progressive disclosure, chunking, and visual hierarchy techniques.

modals.title: Conversion Optimization
modals.subtitle: CONVERSION ENGINEERING
modals.description: We measure the impact of every design decision on conversion through A/B tests and {{h}}Multivariate Tests{{/h}}. We continue iterations until reaching {{h}}Statistical Significance{{/h}} threshold, delivering proven optimizations.

processSteps.step: Behavioral data collection from existing product
processSteps.description: We collect user behaviors and metrics at every stage of the conversion funnel. We establish current conversion rates as benchmarks.
We analyze visual attention distribution at CTA buttons, forms, and critical conversion points. We assess whether users notice conversion elements.
We identify friction points that block conversion. We report conversion barriers such as form complexity, step count, and lack of trust signals.
We deliver conversion optimizations supported by A/B test scenarios. We ensure each recommendation is tested until reaching statistical significance threshold.

modals.title: n8n Automation
modals.subtitle: WORKFLOW AUTOMATION
modals.description: We automate your repetitive business processes with {{h}}n8n Workflows{{/h}}. By connecting systems like CRM, email, invoicing, and stock management, we build {{h}}Smart Automation Chains{{/h}} that reduce human error to zero.

processSteps.description: We analyze your existing workflows end-to-end. We identify manual steps, repetitive tasks, and bottlenecks to create a comprehensive process map.
We evaluate which processes are suitable for automation on an ROI basis. We calculate time savings, error reduction, and cost reduction potentials.
We build custom automation chains by powering n8n's visual workflow engine with Python scripts. We implement API integrations, data transformations, and conditional logic structures.
We test automations in controlled environments, deploy to production, and continuously monitor performance. We report error rates, processing times, and cost savings.

modals.title: Python Scripts
modals.subtitle: CUSTOM SCRIPTING
modals.description: We develop custom {{h}}Python Scripts{{/h}} for your business. With data scraping, automated reporting, {{h}}API Integration{{/h}}, and machine learning models, we create customized solutions that off-the-shelf tools cannot provide.

processSteps.description: We analyze your existing business processes to determine script requirements. We map data sources, transformation requirements, and integration points.
We identify the highest-impact automation opportunities solvable with Python. We assess potential in areas like data scraping, reporting, ML models, and API integration.
We develop custom Python scripts and integrate them with n8n workflows. We build data processing and analysis pipelines using libraries like Pandas, NumPy, and scikit-learn.
We thoroughly test developed scripts, deploy to production, and monitor performance. We set up error handling, logging, and automatic alert systems.

modals.title: Cost Optimization
modals.subtitle: COST REDUCTION ENGINE
modals.description: We detect {{h}}Cost Leaks{{/h}} in your operational processes. By converting manual tasks to automation, we increase your {{h}}Operational Efficiency{{/h}} ratio and minimize total cost of ownership.

processSteps.description: We break down your operational costs on a process basis. We identify cost leak points by calculating each step's time, human resource, and software costs.
We evaluate the automation potential of manual processes through cost-benefit analysis. We prioritize processes that will deliver the highest savings.
We develop automation solutions that drive cost optimization. We build systems that minimize human intervention, reduce error rates, and increase processing speed.
We continuously monitor the cost impact of automations. We provide monthly savings reports, efficiency metrics, and TCO (Total Cost of Ownership) comparisons.

modals.title: System Integration
modals.subtitle: API & SYSTEM BRIDGE
modals.description: We connect your disconnected systems through {{h}}API Bridges{{/h}}. By unifying ERP, CRM, payment, and logistics platforms under a single {{h}}Integrated Ecosystem{{/h}}, we eliminate data silos.

processSteps.description: We map your existing systems and data flows between them. We identify data silos, manual data transfer points, and integration gaps.
We evaluate cross-system integration opportunities in terms of API compatibility, data formats, and security requirements.
We connect your systems through REST APIs, webhooks, and database bridges. We implement data synchronization, format conversion, and error handling layers.
We test integrations end-to-end, verify data accuracy, and deploy to production. We monitor API response times, data consistency, and system uptime metrics.

steps.title: Cognitive Diagnosis
steps.detail: We don't guess. Using heatmaps and behavioral data, we find exactly where the brain gets stuck (friction points).

steps.title: Behavioral Architecture
steps.detail: Before pixels, we design decision paths. We map the user's mental model to ensure flow and clarity.

steps.title: Neuro-Prototyping
steps.detail: We apply 'Attention Engineering'. Adjusting contrast, hierarchy, and layout to scientifically guide the eye.

steps.title: Cognitive Engineering
steps.detail: We code the ecosystem with Next.js and Python. Ensuring backend logic supports frontend psychology.

steps.title: Continuous Optimization
steps.detail: Launch is just day one. We measure Retention and Error Rates to refine the product with real-world brain data.

techStack.title: Powered by Evidence.
techStack.subtitle: The engine powering our perception architecture, combining modern frameworks with scientific rigor.

techs.title: Computer Vision
techs.details: Using OpenCV and custom YOLO models to track gaze and attention in real-time video streams. This allows us to understand exactly where and how long users look.

techs.title: Python AI Core
techs.details: The brain behind our algorithms. We use Python for all data processing, machine learning model training, and API orchestration.

techs.title: Behavioral Science
techs.details: We apply rigorous scientific principles from psychology and neuroscience. It's not about what people say they like; it's about how their brains unconsciously react.

techs.title: Saliency Map
techs.details: We generate predictive heatmaps that simulate human vision. This highlights the most 'attention-grabbing' parts of an interface before any user testing.

techs.title: Next.js & React
techs.details: Building at the frontier of the web. With server-side rendering (SSR), we guarantee our apps are robust, SEO-friendly, and lightning fast.

techs.title: Flutter & Dart
techs.details: We develop seamless, high-performance mobile apps that run natively on both iOS and Android from a single codebase.

caseStudies.title: Laboratory Outputs
caseStudies.subtitle: Scalable digital solutions built on PhD-level research and our proprietary perception engineering framework.

items.title: Kampusyolunda
items.description: Search engine for university selection designed for Gen-Z. Gamified interface and circadian rhythm friendly design.
items.diagnosis: Traditional preference engines increased cognitive load. List structures incompatible with hippocampal learning caused analysis paralysis.
items.solution: Dopamine-based 'Progressive Disclosure' architecture. <50ms FCP with Next.js SSR. Stress-reducing UI via color psychology.

hotspots.title: Foveal Focus Zone
hotspots.content: User attention is 40% more intense in this region.

items.title: TikTaktik
items.diagnosis: Long-format educational content fatigues the prefrontal cortex and reduces retention rates.
items.solution: Dynamic interface increasing foveal focus, integrated with Pomodoro technique. Cross-platform neuro-learning with React Native.

hotspots.title: Time Perception
hotspots.content: Cyclical interface altering user's time perception.

hotspots.title: Progress Tracking
hotspots.content: Motivation boost through visualized success charts.

items.title: Visual Attention Engine
items.description: AI estimating the 'heatmap' of interfaces without human eyes.
items.diagnosis: User testing was costly and time-consuming. Designers made decisions based on 'gut feelings'.
items.solution: Saliency Prediction model trained with Python OpenCV and Deep Learning. Simulates human gaze with 92% accuracy.

hotspots.title: Foveal Concentration
hotspots.content: The primary focus area where eye gaze remains longest, indicating peak cognitive processing.

hotspots.title: Peripheral Awareness
hotspots.content: Secondary zone where users perceive movement or contrast changes without direct focus.

hotspots.title: Cognitive Escape
hotspots.content: High-noise region where user attention tends to drift outside the intended system.

items.title: Tumut Technology
items.diagnosis: Hierarchy clutter and slow load times on corporate sites were damaging brand trust.
items.solution: Minimalist, authoritative design language. Corporate identity building at light speed with Next.js.

hotspots.title: Component Filtering
hotspots.content: Detailed filtering system on the left sidebar.

hotspots.title: Product Cards
hotspots.content: Trust building through clear, high-res product images.

hotspots.title: Quick Quote
hotspots.content: Direct call-to-action on every product card.

items.title: Detay Auto Brake
items.description: Digital transformation and inventory management for the automotive sector.
items.diagnosis: Manual inventory tracking and order processes caused operational blindness.
items.solution: Custom dashboard design. 'Cognitive Cockpit' interface simplifying complex data.

hotspots.title: Corporate Identity
hotspots.content: Trust-inducing dark theme with contrast highlights.

hotspots.title: Emphasis on Dynamism

hotspots.title: Rapid Communication

items.title: Medistasyon

items.diagnosis: Secure and fast sharing of health data was a critical bottleneck.
items.solution: Sterile interface design with E2E encryption and 'Trust-Inducing' color palette.

hotspots.title: Minimalist Iconography

hotspots.title: Neuro-Color Palette

hotspots.title: Fluid Navigation

hero.title: Dr. Bektaş
hero.description: As a brand consultant, my primary focus is to create strategic transformation by redesigning the digital presence of brands. I synthesize my over 10 years of digital strategy background with my academic AI expertise. My goal is not just to read data; it is to use this data to provide measurable perception management for brands.
